title: phoenicaulis cheiranthoides subsp. lanuginosa
intro: Phoenicaulis cheiranthoides subsp. lanuginosa, also known as woolly rockcress, is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a natural expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Phoenicaulis cheiranthoides subsp. lanuginosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in soothing sore throats and reducing the severity of colds and flu. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote respiratory health and alleviate congestion.
